subject: math
activity_templates: A kindergarten counting-to-20 worksheet. A 4x5 grid with numbers 1-20 written in cute bubble letters, with some numbers missing (blank boxes) for the child to fill in. {{character}} points at the first missing number.
A count-and-write worksheet. Five rows, each with a group of 1-20 cute cartoon objects; the child counts and writes the total in a box to the right. {{character}} is among the groups.
A skip counting worksheet for kindergarten: number line across the top. Three rows counting by 2s, by 5s, and by 10s up to 20. Some numbers blank. {{character}} hops along the top number line.
A ten-frame counting worksheet. Four ten-frames partially filled with cute cartoon counters. Child writes the number shown on each. {{character}} holds a counter in the corner.
